beginner.title: Print Star Pattern
beginner.description:
Write a program to print the following star pattern for n rows:
*
**
***
**** (for n=4)

beginner.title: Sum of Two Numbers
beginner.description: Write a program to input two integers and print their sum.

beginner.title: Even or Odd
beginner.description: Write a program to check if a number is even or odd.

intermediate.title: Check Palindrome
intermediate.description: Write a function to check if a given string is a palindrome.

intermediate.title: Array Sum
intermediate.description: Find the sum of all elements in an array.

intermediate.title: Reverse an Array
intermediate.description: Reverse the elements of an array.

advanced.title: String Compression
advanced.description: Given a string, write a function to compress it using the counts of repeated characters (e.g., aabcccccaaa → a2b1c5a3). If the compressed string is not smaller, return the original.

advanced.title: Find Second Largest Number
advanced.description: Given an array, find the second largest number.

advanced.title: Matrix Diagonal Sum
advanced.description: Given a square matrix, find the sum of its main diagonal elements.
